title: Deploying Node.js Applications Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of PaaS platforms (Render/Heroku), the Importance of PM2 Process Management, securing secrets with .env variables, and automated CI/CD.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily goal of 'Deploying' a Node.js application?
options: Putting your application on a live server that is accessible via the internet 24/7.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which type of hosting service (like Render or Railway) handles most of the server configuration automatically?
Which professional tool would you use to ensure your Node.js application restarts automatically if it crashes?
Where should you store sensitive information like database passwords and API keys?
options: In Environment Variables (often stored in a .env file).

questions.question: Does following a 'CI/CD' (Continuous Integration / Continuous Deployment) workflow help automate the testing and deployment of your application?
options: Yes, by using automated scripts every time you push code to GitHub.
